overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit Night City street at night. The camera follows the player character past various storefronts, digital billboards, and pedestrians in a dense cyberpunk urban environment with heavy neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor cafe plaza transitioning to commercial street crossing

events.description: moving from the outdoor cafe seating area onto the red-paved street crossing
approaching the TENGU building entrance, slowing to navigate around vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza and crossing the street toward the TENGU building entrance with neon signage

entered.detail: white patio umbrellas at an outdoor seating area
large pink neon sign with Japanese character and TENGU text
purple neon sign reading BRAINCAGE above a doorway
two bright purple vending machines with hazard stripes
yellow-orange metal crowd control barriers lining the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at an outdoor cafe plaza with white umbrellas, then transitions across a red-paved street toward the TENGU building. The camera approaches the entrance flanked by purple vending machines and neon signage, moving from an open plaza into a more enclosed commercial entrance area.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial sidewalk with orange safety railings

events.description: entering the narrower corridor section with the PieZ shop neon signage overhead
character briefly jogs to navigate around pedestrians on the narrow walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow sidewalk bordered by orange railings, passing various pedestrians and storefronts including the PieZ shop

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white tank top and shorts walking toward camera
character with red mohawk and white crop top walking ahead of camera

entered.detail: continuous orange metal railings separating sidewalk from street
storefront with pink neon PIEZ signage and circular logo
dark concrete overpass connecting buildings overhead

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a narrow sidewalk enclosed by tall buildings and orange safety railings. The PieZ shop's pink neon glow illuminates the left side while pedestrians walk in opposing directions. The environment feels tight and corridor-like with limited sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with active vehicle traffic and neon signage

events.description: pink sports car and other vehicles pass by on the right side of the street
passing under a dark building overhang then emerging back into neon-lit area

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street alongside moving traffic, passing groups of pedestrians near the TURBO sign

notable_agents.action: pink vintage-style sports car driving past on the street
yellow construction vehicle moving slowly in traffic

entered.detail: large illuminated sign reading TURBO above the street
metal public benches lined up along the sidewalk
yellow industrial truck with cab visible in traffic

segments.scene_description: The street opens up slightly as the camera moves past the PieZ shop toward the TURBO sign. Vehicles including a distinctive pink sports car drive past on the right. The sidewalk features public benches and trash receptacles while groups of pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: major commercial intersection with large digital billboards and palm trees

events.description: entering the wider plaza area dominated by the Fuyutsuki building and tall digital towers
passing interactive digital advertising kiosks with animated holographic displays

agents.ego_description: walking past the Fuyutsuki building and digital billboards, moving through a more open commercial district

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians sitting on concrete steps near a building entrance

entered.detail: large red neon sign reading FUYUTSUKI on a modern building facade
tall digital billboard displaying animated advertisements with pink graphics
tall building covered in multiple layers of glowing advertisements and screens
tropical palm trees planted along the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a wider commercial plaza featuring the prominent Fuyutsuki building with red neon signage. Digital advertising kiosks and massive vertical billboards dominate the visual field. Palm trees line the right side while pedestrians sit on steps to the left, creating a bustling cyberpunk city atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner with phone terminals and commercial posters

events.description: character briefly runs to catch up with companion walking ahead
passing a blue phone terminal booth with holographic display

agents.ego_description: walking alongside a companion NPC past phone terminals and posters, approaching a street corner intersection

notable_agents.action: companion with red mohawk and white crop top walking alongside ego
pedestrian in dark clothing with backpack walking ahead

entered.detail: large vertical poster with FORLORN text and character image
bright blue public phone booth with illuminated screen and hologram
construction barriers lining the edge of the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking alongside a companion with a red mohawk past a blue phone terminal and FORLORN poster. The street continues toward an intersection with orange construction barriers on the right. The environment maintains the dense urban cyberpunk aesthetic with neon lighting reflecting off wet pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense urban corridor that evolves from a quiet cafe plaza into a sprawling, neon-drenched commercial district. It begins at an outdoor plaza with white umbrellas, gliding across a red-paved street toward the TENGU building and its purple vending machines. As the camera moves forward, the space tightens into a narrow sidewalk enclosed by tall buildings and orange railings, where the pink glow of a PieZ shop illuminates the path. The scene then opens up as the camera passes a pink sports car and the TURBO sign, eventually expanding into a wide plaza dominated by the Fuyutsuki building's red neon and massive vertical billboards. Finally, the camera follows the character and a red-mohawked companion past a blue phone terminal and construction barriers toward a distant intersection, with neon lights reflecting off the wet pavement.
